_comment: Featured pack metadata for the New Chase daily post. Pack image resolution: if pack_box_break_id (UUID) is set, new_chase.py queries box_breaks.reveal_animation_data->>'packImage' at runtime — this is the canonical 'custom pack image' set via Drip's admin panel and is NOT in any column-level field. pack_image_url is the explicit fallback used when pack_box_break_id is absent OR the DB lookup returns null. pack_price + chase_threshold_multiplier together derive the chase filter (card.price >= pack_price * multiplier) substituted into queries/new_chase.sql at :threshold. pack_name is rendered as-is by src/new_chase_renderer (string_transforms.pack_name_for_canva uppercases + Pokemon-strips it). chase_threshold_multiplier defaults to 10 if omitted; lower it (5, 3) to be more lenient when chase prices in inventory routinely run below 10x the pack price.
